headline: Realty Income & Apollo Set to Form a Strategic Partnership
summary: O to secure $1B from Apollo for a 49% stake in joint venture owning a portfolio of U.S. single-tenant retail properties.

raw.headline: Realty Income & Apollo Set to Form a Strategic Partnership
raw.summary: O to secure $1B from Apollo for a 49% stake in joint venture owning a portfolio of U.S. single-tenant retail properties.

headline: Is Kimco Realty Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: Kimco Realty has underperformed the S&P 500 over the past year, but analysts are cautiously optimistic about the stock’s prospects.
